_comment: Sequence Builder project #48396 — contract import manifest. Run prepare-import.js after deploy to populate addresses.

contracts.name: STLLCEquityToken
contracts.label: STLLC Equity Token
contracts.notes: UUPS upgradeable proxy — import the PROXY address, not the implementation

contracts.name: STDealNote
contracts.label: ST-DEAL-008 Note
contracts.notes: Fixed-yield deal note — 1,290 tokens, $100 face, $106 repayment at maturity

contracts.name: SHTXUtilityToken
contracts.label: SHTX Utility Token
contracts.notes: Loyalty utility token — 10M max supply, 10 SHTX per $1 KhakiSol purchase

contracts.name: STDealTrackRecord
contracts.label: ST Deal Track Record
contracts.notes: Soulbound NFT — locked after mint, one per closed deal

contracts.name: KhakiSolLoyalty
contracts.label: KhakiSol Loyalty
contracts.notes: Multi-token loyalty — IDs 1-5 are badges, ID 6+ are product NFTs with 5% ERC-2981 royalty

contracts.name: STSpreadCollection
contracts.label: ST Spread Collection
contracts.notes: 15-token spread collection: IDs 1-5 deal note NFTs (USDC yield, Reg D), IDs 6-10 KhakiSol product NFTs (5% royalty), IDs 11-15 spread badges (SHTX accrual + transfer cooldown)
